controls.evidence: Round146 preregistered event factors and smoked Tushare endpoints. Round147 PIT/IC prescreen found earnings forecast weak or negative overall after PIT and neutralized IC checks, with 0 promotable factors. This family is closed as a hibernated event-control, not as alpha evidence.
controls.next_action: Do not spend direct mining budget on forecast events unless a new orthogonal, pre-registered event hypothesis is supplied and it repeats PIT signal-date plus industry/style residual IC audits.

controls.evidence: Round146 found dividend rows with ann_date, ex_date, and pay_date. Round147 produced one dividend research lead, but Round148 de-duplicated it against public daily-basic dividend and value exposure: raw IC stayed positive while public-yield exposure was high, residual ICIR fell below gate, and yearly stability failed. This is controlled-retest evidence only.
controls.next_action: Use dividend/ex-right data only after public-yield residualization, yearly stability, and long-cycle walk-forward evidence. Raw yield-like exposure cannot enter portfolio grids.

controls.evidence: Round146 found repurchase, holder-number, and top-holder rows. Round147 PIT/IC and neutral gates showed repurchase failed size-neutral retention, holder-number failed monotonicity and size-neutral quality, and top-holder remained weak. share_float and pledge_stat still have 0-row coverage, so this family is locally blocked instead of globally blocking non-event factor mining.
controls.next_action: Backfill share_float and pledge_stat before re-entering holder/unlock/buyback event candidates; until then keep this event family out of direct factor generation and portfolio grids.
